zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Allgar於1435年出生在英國艾可林瑟爾時，他的父親William Alger35歲，母親Lady Annella Lerue33歲。他於1469年與Margaret Cowley在英國英格蘭艾可維丁頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他在英國英格蘭艾可林瑟爾被列為lord of castle brason head。他去世於1493年12月21日在他的家鄉享年58歲，埋葬在英國艾可林瑟爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Allgar于1435年出生在英国艾可林瑟爾时，他的父亲William Alger35岁，母亲Lady Annella Lerue33岁。他于1469年与Margaret Cowley在英国英格兰艾可維丁頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他在英国英格兰艾可林瑟爾被列为lord of castle brason head。他去世于1493年12月21日在他的家乡享年58岁，埋葬在英国艾可林瑟爾。

nameMeanings.name: Allgar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Algar
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Algar, representing the falling together of two Old English names, Ælfgār and Æthelgār, composed of the elements respectively ælf ‘elf’ or æthel ‘noble’ + gār ‘spear’. It could also be from the much rarer Old English personal name Ealdgār, composed of elements meaning ‘old’ + ‘spear’. In East Anglia, it is more probably a variant of Alger (Old Norse Álfgeirr). See also Agar , Elgar .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Allgar was born in 1435, in Lindsell, Essex, England, his father, William Alger, was 35 and his mother, Lady Annella Lerue, was 33. He married Margaret Cowley in 1469, in Widdington, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. His occupation is listed as lord of castle brason head in Lindsell, Essex, England, United Kingdom. He died on 21 December 1493, in his hometown, at the age of 58, and was buried in Lindsell, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Allgar est né en 1435, à Lindsell, Essex, Angleterre, son père, William Alger, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Lady Annella Lerue, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Cowley en 1469, à Widdington, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est lord of castle brason head à Lindsell, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 21 décembre 1493, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Lindsell, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Allgar 1435 in Lindsell, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Alger 35 und seine Mutter Lady Annella Lerue 33. Er hat 1469 in Widdington, Essex, England, United Kingdom Margaret Cowley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als lord of castle brason head in Lindsell, Essex, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 21. Dezember 1493 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Lindsell, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Allgar è nato il nel 1435 nel Lindsell, Essex, England, il suo padre, William Alger, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Lady Annella Lerue, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Cowley nel 1469, nel Widdington, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come lord of castle brason head nel Lindsell, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 21 dicembre 1493, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Lindsell, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Allgarが1435年にイギリスエセックスリンドセルで生まれた時，父William Algerは35歳，母Lady Annella Lerueは33歳であった。1469年にイギリスイギリスエセックスウィッドイントンでMargaret Cowleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。イギリスイギリスエセックスリンドセルでの職業はlord of castle brason headと記録されている。彼は1493年12月21日に故郷で58歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスリンドセルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Allgar(이)가 1435년 영국 에세스 린드셀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Alger(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Annella Lerue(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1469년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 위딩턴에서 Margaret Cowley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 린드셀에서 lord of castle brason head이었다. 그는 1493년 12월 21일 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 린드셀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Allgar nasceu em 1435, em Lindsell, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Alger, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Lady Annella Lerue, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Cowley em 1469, em Widdington, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como lord of castle brason head em Lindsell, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 21 de dezembro de 1493, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Lindsell, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Allgar родился в 1435 г. в местности линдселл, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени William Alger было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Annella Lerue, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Cowley в 1469 г. в местности виддингтон, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери.  Он работал по профессии lord of castle brason head в местности линдселл, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 21 декабря 1493 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности линдселл, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Allgar nació en 1435, en Lindsell, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, William Alger, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Lady Annella Lerue, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Margaret Cowley en 1469, en Widdington, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era lord of castle brason head en Lindsell, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 21 de diciembre de 1493, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Lindsell, Essex, Inglaterra.
